map: VIDEO-RECOVERED (tutorial fSO2ZflJRco): multi-room — BROWN WOODEN LODGE rooms (plank floors, wood walls) connected by SNOW/ICE corridors (light-blue snow, ice tiles, rock outcrops). 'Tower' enemies are scattered and must be cleared. The ICE QUEEN's boss room is GATED: 'clear the ice block to kill the towers and then it opens'. Boss arena = oval room with PINK CRYSTAL formations on dark stone, ringed by snow walls.

bosses.name: Ice Queen (a.k.a. Frozen Queen)
phases: VIDEO: fought in a gated pink-crystal arena, opened by clearing the ice blocks/towers
attacks: ice/frost projectiles (theme); pattern timing TBD from a boss-kill clip
minions: Tower / 'Tower Elite' structures (must be destroyed to open the boss room)

drops: Ninja set incl. 'Traceless' (cloak) — VIDEO-noted as dropping here
mechanics: Destroy ice blocks -> kills the towers -> opens the Ice Queen's room.
uncertain: Ice Queen exact stats/attack timings + taunts need a boss-KILL clip (this is a cheese/route tutorial). Texture indices unknown.
confidence: VIDEO-DOCUMENTED: layout (wooden lodge + snow corridors), the ice-block/tower gating mechanic, the pink-crystal Ice Queen arena, and a Ninja 'Traceless' set drop. Drops cross-checked vs wiki. Stats pending.
